chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 416 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.3433/2022 22.09.2025 Mr. Perviaz Ahmed Memon, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel states that the impugned judgment has been rendered on appreciation of facts, therefore, the reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
